2026 Vibe Coding Game Jam Prototype

OBSOLETE

A stubborn 90s laptop wakes up in a junkyard and refuses to be sorted into scrap. This version plays the same jam-scale story in a small Three.js diorama.

Memory

0/3 fragments

Battery

Scrapyard Story

Obsolete

Escape the junk line, restore your power, and prove you still work.

WASD / Arrow Keys move, E interacts, Enter starts, R restarts.

Recovery BIOS


          


          

            
Utility Proof / POST

            
Diagnostic 1/3

            
Watch carefully.

            

            

              Repeat the sequence with Arrow Keys or WASD. Three clean rounds opens the
              final route.
            

          


          

            
Escape Complete

            
You Escaped.

            
The junkyard called you obsolete. Sunrise disagreed.

            
          


          

            
Scrap Heap

            
Press Enter to boot up.

          

        


        

          

            
Act

            
Title Screen

          

          

            
Hint

            
Press Enter to boot up.

          

        

      


      

        

          
Controls

          

            WASD / Arrow Keys move, E interacts,
            Enter starts or confirms, R restarts, and
            F toggles fullscreen.
          

        

        

          
Loop

          

            Boot up, push charge back into your body, survive the conveyor line, then
            pass one final diagnostic.
          

        

        

          
Look

          

            Low-poly scrap, warm dawn fog, CRT glass, chunky silhouettes, and small
            synth beeps.
